name: orchestration
description: Multi-agent orchestration skill for Claude Code: decompose coding work into parallel executor agents, route tasks to models (Haiku 4.5 / Sonnet 5 / Opus 5 / Opus 4.8), pick reasoning effort, write closed task prompts, and review executor results. One skill for every orchestrator model — it detects its own model and loads the matching orchestrator profile (Fable 5, Opus 5, or Opus 4.8). Grounded in Anthropic system cards.
